data.title: Implement Project Initiation Feature
data.description: Develop AI-powered project initiation feature, including project scope definition, resource allocation, and timeline creation.
data.acceptance_criteria: Project initiation feature is fully functional and integrated with task management feature.

data.title: Develop Task Management Feature
data.description: Implement automated task assignment and tracking feature.
data.acceptance_criteria: Task management feature is fully functional and integrated with project initiation feature.

data.title: Implement Collaboration Tools
data.description: Develop integrated collaboration tools for team members to share knowledge and ideas.
data.acceptance_criteria: Collaboration tools are fully functional and integrated with task management feature.

data.title: Develop Reporting and Analytics Feature
data.description: Implement basic project reporting and analytics feature.
data.acceptance_criteria: Reporting and analytics feature is fully functional and integrated with project initiation feature.

data.title: Implement User Authentication and Authorization
data.description: Develop user authentication and authorization feature using JSON Web Tokens (JWT).
data.acceptance_criteria: User authentication and authorization feature is fully functional and secure.

data.title: Develop Database Schema
data.description: Design and implement database schema for project data storage.
data.acceptance_criteria: Database schema is fully functional and optimized for project data storage.

data.title: Implement AI/ML Model
data.description: Develop AI-powered project management model using TensorFlow.js.
data.acceptance_criteria: AI/ML model is fully functional and integrated with project initiation feature.

data.title: Develop Frontend UI Components
data.description: Implement UI components for project initiation, task management, and collaboration tools.
data.acceptance_criteria: Frontend UI components are fully functional and visually appealing.

data.title: Implement API Endpoints
data.description: Develop API endpoints for project initiation, task management, and collaboration tools.
data.acceptance_criteria: API endpoints are fully functional and secure.

data.title: Develop Testing Framework
data.description: Implement testing framework for project initiation, task management, and collaboration tools.
data.acceptance_criteria: Testing framework is fully functional and covers all project features.

data.title: Implement Security Measures
data.description: Develop security measures for project data storage and API endpoints.
data.acceptance_criteria: Security measures are fully functional and secure.

data.title: Develop Deployment Script
data.description: Implement deployment script for project deployment to production environment.
data.acceptance_criteria: Deployment script is fully functional and automates project deployment.

data.title: Implement Monitoring and Logging
data.description: Develop monitoring and logging feature for project performance and errors.
data.acceptance_criteria: Monitoring and logging feature is fully functional and provides insights on project performance.

data.title: Develop Backup and Recovery
data.description: Implement backup and recovery feature for project data storage.
data.acceptance_criteria: Backup and recovery feature is fully functional and ensures data integrity.

data.title: Implement Load Balancing
data.description: Develop load balancing feature for project performance and scalability.
data.acceptance_criteria: Load balancing feature is fully functional and ensures project performance and scalability.

data.title: Implement Caching
data.description: Develop caching feature for project performance and scalability.
data.acceptance_criteria: Caching feature is fully functional and ensures project performance and scalability.

data.title: Implement Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Develop CDN feature for project performance and scalability.
data.acceptance_criteria: CDN feature is fully functional and ensures project performance and scalability.

data.title: Implement Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Develop WAF feature for project security and performance.
data.acceptance_criteria: WAF feature is fully functional and ensures project security and performance.

data.title: Implement Disaster Recovery
data.description: Develop disaster recovery feature for project data storage and performance.
data.acceptance_criteria: Disaster recovery feature is fully functional and ensures project data storage and performance.

data.title: Implement Compliance and Governance
data.description: Develop compliance and governance feature for project security and performance.
data.acceptance_criteria: Compliance and governance feature is fully functional and ensures project security and performance.

data.title: Implement project planning feature
data.description: Create a feature to automatically plan projects based on user input
data.acceptance_criteria: The feature should be able to plan projects with multiple tasks and deadlines
